front: What is the role of surfactants in peptide formulations?
back: Surfactants (polysorbate 20/80, poloxamer 188) prevent: 1) Interfacial aggregation (air-liquid, liquid-container), 2) Surface adsorption, 3) Foam formation during filling. Concentration: 0.01-0.1%. Risk: surfactant oxidation can generate peroxides that damage peptides. Monitoring: critical micelle concentration (CMC).
